title: Saudi Ricotta Fritters
description: A twist on traditional fritters, this recipe combines creamy ricotta cheese with a hint of Saudi spices, perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together ricotta cheese, diced pineapple, ground cinnamon, and ground cardamom.
Heat the melted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the ricotta mixture into the melted butter.
Fry the ricotta balls until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the butter and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
